---

title: "D04_04: Time Series Expansion"
subtitle: "Build complete sales time series for Poisson analysis"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_04"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D04_00_product_dictionary"
outputs_to:
  - "D04_02_poisson_analysis"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "eby_D04_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/eby/"
  - script: "all_D04_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_04: Time Series Expansion {#overview}

This task builds complete sales time series for Poisson analysis. Behavior is
platform-specific (CBZ/EBY ETL wrappers, ALL wrapper).

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_04.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | Delegates to ETL time series script |
| eBay | `eby_D04_04.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/eby/` | Delegates to ETL time series script |
| All | `all_D04_04.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | Delegates to `all_D04_07.R` |

## Platform Behavior

### CBZ (ETL-Driven)

- Time series build is implemented in a derived ETL script.
- `cbz_D04_04.R` is a wrapper that triggers the ETL step.
- Inputs:
  - `transformed_data.df_cbz_sales___transformed`
  - `raw_data.df_all_item_profile_{product_line}`
  - `app_data.df_product_line` (preferred) or
    `data/app_data/parameters/scd_type1/df_product_line.csv` (fallback)
- ETL script:
  - `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/cbz/cbz_ETL_sales_time_series_2TR.R`
- Outputs:
  - `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}`
  - `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series`
- Note: This ETL produces base time series fields; feature enrichment occurs downstream.

### EBY (ETL-Driven)

- Time series build is implemented in a derived ETL script.
- `eby_D04_04.R` is a wrapper that triggers the ETL step.
- Requires ETL outputs:
  - `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/eby/eby_ETL_sales_2TR___MAMBA.R`
    -> `transformed_data.df_eby_sales___transformed___MAMBA`
  - `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/all/all_ETL_item_profile_0IM.R`
    -> `raw_data.df_all_item_profile_{product_line}`
- ETL script:
  - `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/eby/eby_ETL_sales_time_series_2TR___MAMBA.R`
- Inputs:
  - `transformed_data.df_eby_sales___transformed___MAMBA`
  - `raw_data.df_all_item_profile_{product_line}`
- Outputs:
  - `app_data.df_eby_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}`
  - `app_data.df_eby_sales_complete_time_series`

### ALL (Wrapper)

- `all_D04_04.R` delegates to [D04_07: Precision Time Series Completion](D04_07_precision_time_series.qmd).
- Output is `processed_data.df_precision_time_series` (placeholder schema when sales data is missing).

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
EXPAND D04_04_time_series:
  FOR CBZ:
    FROM transformed_data.df_cbz_sales___transformed
    JOIN raw_data.df_all_item_profile_{product_line}
    COMPLETE_TIME_SERIES BY day WITH zero_fill
    OUTPUT TO app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}
  FOR EBY:
  FROM transformed_data.df_eby_sales___transformed___MAMBA
  JOIN raw_data.df_all_item_profile_{product_line}
  COMPLETE_TIME_SERIES BY day WITH zero_fill
  OUTPUT TO app_data.df_eby_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}
```

## Output Tables

- `app_data.df_eby_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}`
- `app_data.df_eby_sales_complete_time_series`
- `processed_data.df_precision_time_series` (ALL track)

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_02: Poisson Analysis Core](D04_02_poisson_analysis.qmd).
